name: Verbose Output
description: Produce detailed step-by-step output with reasoning for each action taken.

name: Strict Mode
description: Enforce strict validation — treat any warning as a failure. Do not skip minor issues.

name: Retry on Failure
description: Automatically retry failed steps up to 3 times before reporting as failed.

name: Responsive
description: Add responsive breakpoint coverage. Validate the story across desktop/tablet-style widths, use the live browser plus recordings as evidence. VISUALLY INSPECT every page at each breakpoint for: truncated text (words cut off like 'Low stock i...' instead of 'Low stock items'), labels crammed together without spacing (e.g. 'PendingConfirmedProcessingReady' instead of 'Pending | Confirmed | Processing'), horizontal overflow or scrollbars, cards/buttons overlapping or off-screen, unreadable table columns, and hidden actions. Report each as a WARNING with the affected viewport, URL, and recording timestamp.

name: Mobile
description: Add a dedicated mobile pass. Switch the browser to a phone-sized viewport (375x812) during the run, execute the critical mobile workflow, and use the live browser plus recordings as evidence. CRITICAL: After each page navigation, VISUALLY INSPECT the rendered page for layout issues — do NOT just check if elements exist. Look for: (1) truncated text in cards, badges, or labels (e.g. text ending with '...' or cut off mid-word), (2) status labels or stepper text crammed together without gaps, (3) content pushed off-screen or requiring horizontal scroll, (4) overlapping elements or z-index issues, (5) buttons/links too small to tap (<44px), (6) modals/drawers that don't fit the screen, (7) forms where labels overlap inputs. Report EACH visual issue as a separate WARNING finding with severity, affected URL, element description, and recording timestamp. Do not skip cosmetic issues — they are real usability bugs on mobile.

name: Tablet/iPad
description: Add a dedicated iPad/tablet pass. Switch the browser to a tablet-sized viewport (1024x768) during the run, execute the core workflow, and use the live browser plus recordings as evidence. VISUALLY INSPECT every page for tablet-specific layout issues: sidebar collapse behavior, split-view problems, form layouts that break between desktop and mobile breakpoints, truncated table columns, cards that don't reflow properly, status steppers with crammed labels, and touch-target sizing. Report each as a WARNING with affected viewport and recording timestamp.

name: Detailed Report
description: Generate a comprehensive markdown report following {workspace}/requirements/output-format.md format. Include findings table, severity breakdown, and actionable fix suggestions for Claude Code.
